values.value:
Hello {{1}},
Greetings from Runwal Enterprises!
Your access to the Runwal Elevate – Channel Partner App is now available.
Login Details: Registered Email: {{2}} Registered Phone: {{3}}
For first-time login, please use the default password runwal@1234 and update it after logging in.
Through the app, you can view project details, share offers with customers, and track billings and payouts.
If you face any issues accessing the app, please contact your sales representative.
